description: Fields for creating or updating a change request.
name: ChangeRequestInput

short_description.description: A brief summary of the change.

description.description: A detailed description of the change.

assigned_to.description: The sys_id of the assigned user.

assignment_group.description: The sys_id of the assignment group.

requested_by.description: The sys_id of the requesting user.

start_date.description: The planned start date and time.

end_date.description: The planned end date and time.

cmdb_ci.description: The sys_id of the affected configuration item.

justification.description: The business justification for the change.

implementation_plan.description: The plan for implementing the change.

backout_plan.description: The plan for reverting the change if needed.

test_plan.description: The plan for testing the change.
